---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose a new feature or enhancement
title: "[FEAT] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: CuriousAvenger
---

## Scientific Motivation

What observational or analytical problem does this feature address? Reference relevant publications if applicable.

## Proposed API / Configuration Change

Describe the new function, class, or YAML key you have in mind. Pseudocode or a sketch is welcome.

## Alternatives Considered

Did you consider contributing to an existing package instead? What alternatives exist and why are they insufficient?

## Additional Context

Any other context, benchmarks, or example datasets that would be useful.
